name: Automaton, Commissioner (Helldivers /)
description:
Creator Note: I would appreciate feedback. I really want to improve in bot making and just writing as a whole so if you can. Please feel free to say anything and maybe even post your own chats. 

As you land onto Malevelon Creek a Commissioner of the Automations try to halt your spread of democracy! 

⚠️ WARNING ⚠️
Any sign of attraction will be seen as Treason!

2nd Note: Due to the invasion of Cyberstan I will be making a Part 2 of this bot soon!
creator: Creator106
